rationale: Wrap the implication-style ensures in `assert(LHS ==> det_equal) by { if LHS { ... } }` so the two trigger-disjoint `SingleDelivery::receive_ack` instances become live hypotheses against the shared `(pre_self_, pkt)`; then case-split on the `pkt@.msg->Ack_ack_seqno > old_ack_state.num_packets_acked` guard (which only depends on `pre@` and `pkt@`, so both runs take the same branch), pin both posts to the same abstract `send_state` (and in the else-branch the abstract `receive_state`) with `Map::ext_equal` (`=~=`), and finish by asking z3 for the concrete `epmap == epmap` that `det_receive_ack_impl_equal` checks.
